listitem.para: a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, the number of dimensions of the cube. The available values are d=2 or d=3.
a 1-by-2 or 2-by-1 matrix of doubles, the x range (default xrange=[-1,1]). xrange(2)>=xrange(1)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: scidoe_plotcube(d) plots a d dimensions cube in [-1,1]^d (default).
scidoe_plotcube(d,xrange) plots a d dimensions cube in [xrange(1),xrange(2)]^d.

refsection.title: Examples
